/usr/bin/ar qc liblights3_core.a CMakeFiles/lights3_core.dir/src/core/thread_pool.cc.o CMakeFiles/lights3_core.dir/src/core/config.cc.o CMakeFiles/lights3_core.dir/src/core/util/crypto.cc.o CMakeFiles/lights3_core.dir/src/core/util/uri.cc.o CMakeFiles/lights3_core.dir/src/core/util/time.cc.o CMakeFiles/lights3_core.dir/src/http/server.cc.o CMakeFiles/lights3_core.dir/src/s3/errors.cc.o CMakeFiles/lights3_core.dir/src/s3/xml.cc.o CMakeFiles/lights3_core.dir/src/s3/router.cc.o CMakeFiles/lights3_core.dir/src/s3/service.cc.o CMakeFiles/lights3_core.dir/src/s3/auth/sigv4.cc.o CMakeFiles/lights3_core.dir/src/s3/handlers/buckets.cc.o CMakeFiles/lights3_core.dir/src/s3/handlers/objects.cc.o CMakeFiles/lights3_core.dir/src/s3/handlers/list_objects.cc.o CMakeFiles/lights3_core.dir/src/storage/validate.cc.o CMakeFiles/lights3_core.dir/src/storage/listing.cc.o CMakeFiles/lights3_core.dir/src/storage/registry.cc.o CMakeFiles/lights3_core.dir/src/storage/bucket_router.cc.o CMakeFiles/lights3_core.dir/src/storage/localfs/localfs_backend.cc.o CMakeFiles/lights3_core.dir/src/storage/memory/memory_backend.cc.o CMakeFiles/lights3_core.dir/src/http/drivers/builtin/builtin_server.cc.o CMakeFiles/lights3_core.dir/src/http/drivers/beast/beast_server.cc.o CMakeFiles/lights3_core.dir/src/http/drivers/httplib/httplib_server.cc.o
/usr/bin/ranlib liblights3_core.a
